Appearances:

John Zanghi, Esq. for plaintiff Hoy and Velma Henderson.
Maggie Mayo, Esq., representing the Defendants Chelsea Roberts; Alesai Converse and Edgar Acosta, through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem: Jason Jungries, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502-B, for settlement discussions.

Case did not settle, trial date confirmed.
